issue.title: document-endpoint wrong HTTP status codes for REST endpoints
issue.body:
## Steps to reproduce
1. Call `document-endpoint(method="POST", path="/api/users", repo="sample-spring-minimal")`
2. Call `document-endpoint(method="DELETE", path="/api/orders/{id}", repo="sample-spring-minimal")`

## Actual behavior
- POST /api/users returns status 200 instead of 201 (CREATED)
- DELETE /api/orders/{id} returns status 200 instead of 204 (NO_CONTENT)

## Expected behavior
- POST creating a resource should return 201
- DELETE should return 204 when no body is returned

## User impact
Generated API documentation conveys incorrect semantics. Consumers of the documentation may implement incorrect error handling.

## Evidence
```json
document-endpoint(method="POST", path="/api/users", ...) →
{ "responseCodes": [{ "code": "200" }] }
// Expected: [{ "code": "201" }]

document-endpoint(method="DELETE", path="/api/orders/{id}", ...) →
{ "responseCodes": [{ "code": "200" }] }
// Expected: [{ "code": "204" }]
```
